brief: GitLab Q1 FY27 quarterly business review for the board from public filings: a fourth straight revenue beat and a raised full-year guide, one honest flag — self-managed flat quarter on quarter for the first time since IPO — named enterprise wins, pipeline coverage, risks, and next-quarter priorities.

arguments.contentBrief: GitLab Q1 FY27 quarterly business review for the board from public filings: a fourth straight revenue beat and a raised full-year guide, one honest flag — self-managed flat quarter on quarter for the first time since IPO — named enterprise wins, pipeline coverage, risks, and next-quarter priorities.

structuredContent.rationale: Selected 'quarter' (deck-quarterly-business-review, conventional style); shares audience(s) [executive, business]; matched intent keyword(s) [review, quarterly, performance, the, board]; conventional style fits restricted corporate suitability; motion preference 1 noted (the template locks its own motion).

sections.purpose: The cover — org, period, the one-line lead, confidentiality, and the synthetic notice.

spec.name: deck.title
spec.guidance: The deck title, shown on the persistent title bar of every slide, e.g. "Quarterly Business Review".

slots.guidance: The deck title, shown on the persistent title bar of every slide, e.g. "Quarterly Business Review".

spec.name: deck.org
spec.guidance: Organisation name, set in mono small-caps above the cover title.

slots.guidance: Organisation name, set in mono small-caps above the cover title.

spec.name: deck.period
spec.guidance: The reporting period and deck kind, e.g. "Q3 FY26 · Quarterly Business Review".

slots.guidance: The reporting period and deck kind, e.g. "Q3 FY26 · Quarterly Business Review".

spec.name: deck.periodShort
spec.guidance: The short reporting period composed into the title-bar tag and the vs-plan caption, e.g. "Q3 FY26".

slots.guidance: The short reporting period composed into the title-bar tag and the vs-plan caption, e.g. "Q3 FY26".

spec.name: deck.confidentiality
spec.guidance: Distribution line, e.g. "CONFIDENTIAL — BOARD DISTRIBUTION".

slots.guidance: Distribution line, e.g. "CONFIDENTIAL — BOARD DISTRIBUTION".

spec.name: deck.notice
spec.guidance: REQUIRED synthetic-data notice printed on every footer rule.

slots.guidance: REQUIRED synthetic-data notice printed on every footer rule.

spec.name: summary.lead
spec.guidance: One sentence framing the quarter — the honest through-line, shown on the cover.

slots.guidance: One sentence framing the quarter — the honest through-line, shown on the cover.

sections.purpose: The numbered agenda — the five sections the deck will walk.

spec.name: agenda
spec.guidance: Numbered sections; each has a short title (≤20 chars) and a one-line detail (≤90 chars).

slots.guidance: Numbered sections; each has a short title (≤20 chars) and a one-line detail (≤90 chars).

sections.purpose: The executive summary — three-to-five sentences, one of them naming the anomaly.

spec.name: summary.sentences
spec.guidance: Numbered summary sentences; one should name the flagged metric so the flag is not a surprise.

slots.guidance: Numbered summary sentences; one should name the flagged metric so the flag is not a surprise.

spec.name: anomalyLabel
spec.guidance: REQUIRED verbatim flag, echoed here and on the KPI slide, e.g. "NRR 96% — BELOW 100% FLOOR".

slots.guidance: REQUIRED verbatim flag, echoed here and on the KPI slide, e.g. "NRR 96% — BELOW 100% FLOOR".

sections.purpose: The four headline metrics with a vs-plan mini-table; exactly one is flagged.

spec.name: kpis
spec.guidance: Exactly four KPI tiles; exactly one carries status "off-track" — the single red figure in a green row. Values with unit "percent" are FRACTIONS (0.14 renders as 14.0%), and delta is ALWAYS a fraction of change whatever the unit (0.23 renders as +23.0%) — never an absolute.

slots.guidance: Exactly four KPI tiles; exactly one carries status "off-track" — the single red figure in a green row. Values with unit "percent" are FRACTIONS (0.14 renders as 14.0%), and delta is ALWAYS a fraction of change whatever the unit (0.23 renders as +23.0%) — never an absolute.

spec.name: kpiVsPlan
spec.guidance: One vs-plan row per KPI: metric, actual, plan, delta — neutral ink so the flag stays the only red element.

slots.guidance: One vs-plan row per KPI: metric, actual, plan, delta — neutral ink so the flag stays the only red element.

spec.name: kpiNote
spec.guidance: One-line reading of the row, e.g. "Three are on track; net revenue retention is not.".

slots.guidance: One-line reading of the row, e.g. "Three are on track; net revenue retention is not.".
slots.example: Three are on track; net revenue retention is not.

spec.name: anomalyLabel
spec.guidance: REQUIRED verbatim flag shown in the pinned strip under the tiles.

slots.guidance: REQUIRED verbatim flag shown in the pinned strip under the tiles.

sections.purpose: The multi-quarter revenue trend (comp.trend-chart).

spec.name: revenueSeries.id
spec.guidance: Stable machine id for the revenue series, e.g. "revenue".

slots.guidance: Stable machine id for the revenue series, e.g. "revenue".

spec.name: revenueSeries.label
spec.guidance: The series name for the revenue line — its accessible data-table column header, e.g. "Recognised revenue".

slots.guidance: The series name for the revenue line — its accessible data-table column header, e.g. "Recognised revenue".

spec.name: revenueSeries.points
spec.guidance: Six-to-ten period points on the revenueSeries object; each is { x: period label (≤16 chars), y: value | null }, and the last point is the reporting quarter.

slots.guidance: Six-to-ten period points on the revenueSeries object; each is { x: period label (≤16 chars), y: value | null }, and the last point is the reporting quarter.

spec.name: revenueNote
spec.guidance: Source note explaining the trend and any step, shown under the chart.

slots.guidance: Source note explaining the trend and any step, shown under the chart.

sections.purpose: Revenue by segment against plan (comp.category-bar-chart).

spec.name: headlines.segment
spec.guidance: The segment slide's editorial headline — a claim that must be TRUE of your segments, e.g. "Where the growth came from.".

slots.guidance: The segment slide's editorial headline — a claim that must be TRUE of your segments, e.g. "Where the growth came from.".

spec.name: segments
spec.guidance: Three-to-six segments; each a value with an optional plan target (diamond marker).

slots.guidance: Three-to-six segments; each a value with an optional plan target (diamond marker).

spec.name: segmentNote
spec.guidance: Which segments beat, which missed, and how that ties to the flag.

slots.guidance: Which segments beat, which missed, and how that ties to the flag.

sections.purpose: Two columns — deals won and deals lost.

spec.name: wins
spec.guidance: Deals won; each has a name, a value, and a one-line note.

slots.guidance: Deals won; each has a name, a value, and a one-line note.

spec.name: losses
spec.guidance: Deals lost; keep the count matched to wins so the two columns balance.

slots.guidance: Deals lost; keep the count matched to wins so the two columns balance.

sections.purpose: The weighted pipeline table by stage.

spec.name: pipeline
spec.guidance: Pipeline stages: stage, deal count, weighted value, coverage multiple.

slots.guidance: Pipeline stages: stage, deal count, weighted value, coverage multiple.

spec.name: pipelineNote
spec.guidance: Coverage reading against the next-quarter target.

slots.guidance: Coverage reading against the next-quarter target.

sections.purpose: Risks and mitigations table.

spec.name: risks
spec.guidance: Each risk: a name, a severity (High | Medium | Low), and a mitigation.

slots.guidance: Each risk: a name, a severity (High | Medium | Low), and a mitigation.

sections.purpose: The numbered next-quarter priorities.

spec.name: priorities
spec.guidance: Numbered priorities; each a short title (≤40 chars) and a one-line detail (≤160 chars).

slots.guidance: Numbered priorities; each a short title (≤40 chars) and a one-line detail (≤160 chars).

sections.purpose: The data-notes appendix declaring the figures synthetic.

spec.name: dataNotes
spec.guidance: Method notes; the first should declare every figure synthetic and illustrative.

slots.guidance: Method notes; the first should declare every figure synthetic and illustrative.

craftGuarantees: Deliberately conventional slide anatomy: a persistent navy title bar, a 12-column content grid, a numbered agenda, and a footer rule — executed flawlessly, no world conceit.
Exactly one KPI carries the off-track anomaly status: the single red figure in an otherwise green row, echoed verbatim in the executive summary.
The synthetic-data notice is required and prints on the footer rule of every slide.
Restrained single fade/rise motion (motionLevel 1); the mood is locked light.
Slot char caps and item counts are sized so any schema-valid fill stays composed — headlines never overflow and grids stay balanced.

text.rationale: Selected 'quarter' (deck-quarterly-business-review, conventional style); shares audience(s) [executive, business]; matched intent keyword(s) [review, quarterly, performance, the, board]; conventional style fits restricted corporate suitability; motion preference 1 noted (the template locks its own motion).
